response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust expertise in commercial routing or geospatial data pipelines, and their recent work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — none of which meet the core requirement for modern C++ in routing tile systems. Their GIS projects are open-source and non-production, with no evidence of low-latency, high-reliability routing tile infrastructure or distributed systems design at scale.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project experience with GISCollective and Open Green Map
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages quickly
Extensive background in testing, CI/CD, and system reliability practices
concerns: No demonstrated commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing or navigation systems
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not the required C++ for routing tile pipelines
Lacks evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time traffic integration at scale
